  • "Sameer's"

Dr. Sameer Jain, who graduated and post-graduated in Physics, was awarded Ph.D. in Physics (Ferroelectrics) by Delhi College of Engineering, Delhi (Now DTU). He mentored B. Tech., M. Tech students during the last fifteen years at DTU. He also taught Physics and Digital Electronics to BCA and MCA courses at an institute affiliated with I. P. University, Delhi.

Dr. Sameer Jain is an academician guiding and preparing students of Class XII and XI for CBSE and various Medical and Non – Medical entrance exams. “Sameer’s” Physics Classes is an endeavor aimed to prepare students of Class XI and XII to achieve the best possible results in Physics. With the aim of providing thorough knowledge “Sameer’s” aim is to provide the best with the help of smart class studio and practical sessions. We are committed to delivering superior values and leave no stone unturned in the path of success of our students.

Sameer's Physics Classes for XI

“Sameer’s” is running a CBSE based Class XI Physics course for students studying in Class XI. The course is designed to prepare the basic and advanced fundamentals of Physics at Class XI. Students are prepared for CBSE with a touch of higher level for better understanding of the subject. for XI


Contact Us

Sameer's Physics Classes for XII

“Sameer’s” is running a CBSE based Class XII Physics course for students studying in class XII. The course is designed to prepare the basic and advanced fundamentals of Physics as specified by CBSE for Class XII students. Students are prepared for CBSE with a touch of higher level for their excellent results in CBSE and a strong base for entrance exams.


Contact Us

What Students say

Mokshi Reshi

Since the moment when I joined sameer's sir Physics classes, I felt like a part of family my love for physics subject was increasing day by day. I love to solve the numerials & play with them. The subject become so interesting for me

Rishabh Sharma

I had a great time doing in in institute. It is worth for what you are investing on. I got very goodmotivation from the respective sir.I look forward to recommending you everyone you to I know.

Snigdha Jain

Dr. Sameen Jain, my father is my mentor also. I feel proud of him and Sameer's is my pride. I look back upon the time when I used to go to the classes where I used to learn Physics in a fun way that was help me so much in development of the person I am today. classes go that fun way has helped development of prede.

Kanishka Arora

Class environment is very friendly and interactive. Sir made the concepts easier for us to understand and learn

Sakshi Chaudhary

My time with Sameer sir was so productive. He's like a mentor and an excellent teacher who will inspire you even after your completion of the course. The sufficient notes and study material he provides make our efficiency in learning high along with the guidance for our practical’s and the doubt sessions were also helpful for me. All in all it was a wonderful learning experience for 2 years.

Vanshikha Jain

Learning + Laughter = Sameer’s Physics Classes. The most popular subject that creates fear among Students is physics. But it was my favourite and I could excel in that only because of the way sir teaches and motivates.
It was very homely experience for me at Sameer’s Physics Classes. Even sir’s scolding felt same as of my father’s concern to be wanting the best out of me.

Vasu Arora

For me, learning physics was not an easy joke and I was always tensed about it, but since I joined Sameer Sir’s classes, it became my favourite subject. Solving numerical became so much interesting.

Vriti

Under respected Sameer Sir’s guidance, I was able to develop a better understanding of the subject. His teaching skills not only enhanced my knowledge but also helped me develop confidence.
